mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_post (post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, create_by, create_time, deleted, remark) VALUES (#{postCode}, #{postName}, #{postSort}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_post
post_code = #{postCode}, post_name = #{postName}, post_sort = #{postSort}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_post SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_post WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_post WHERE post_code = #{postCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_post WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY post_sort ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_post p WHERE p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.post_sort ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_post p WHERE p.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_post p
p.deleted = 0
AND p.post_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{postName}, '%')
AND p.post_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{postCode}, '%')
AND p.status = #{status}

SELECT * FROM sys_post p
p.deleted = 0
AND p.post_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{postName}, '%')
AND p.post_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{postCode}, '%')
AND p.status = #{status}
ORDER BY p.post_sort ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_post WHERE post_code = #{postCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_post WHERE post_name = #{postName} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_post WHERE post_code = #{postCode} AND deleted = 1
